category_sources: source_facts.description: Utility for rendering project templates; official Copier GitHub org/repo describes it as a library and command-line utility for rendering project templates
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub organization use Copier at https://copier.readthedocs.io/en/stable/ and https://github.com/copier-org/copier
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://copier.readthedocs.io/; official GitHub organization also links to copier.readthedocs.io
repo_sources: Official copier-org GitHub page lists the copier repository as the library and command-line utility for rendering project templates
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe rendering project templates; official docs cover generating projects and template usage
